title: An Act establishing a sick leave bank for William Blalock, an employee of the Suffolk county sheriff’s office

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Field of Taunton (by request), a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Jim Durkin  for legislation to establish a sick leave bank for William Blalock, an employee of the Suffolk County Sheriff’s Office.  Public Service.
